summary: Execute strong-pi pulsed ODMR alignment screen for image231924_c01 after successful TrackCenter.
scientific_rationale: The project requires finding an NV aligned to the magnetic field from image231924, and human advice says alignment must be judged by strong-pi pulsed ODMR because the piezo/field may have changed. image231924_c01 passed TrackCenter with final counts 36.008 kcps, so the next needed evidence is a bounded strong-pi pulsed ODMR resonance/alignment screen near the expected ms=+1 aligned-band frequency.
comparison_targets: image231924_c01 TrackCenter terminal pass at 36.008 kcps
human advice: strong-pi pODMR after recent piezo/field change and about 20-30 points for time-saving screens
live pulsed_odmr_rabimodulated_v1 manifest and Rabimodulated.xml route review note
expected_evidence: terminal bridge result and savedexperiment MAT for Rabimodulated mw_freq scan
healthy auto-align/TrackCenter final counts before RunExperiment
raw/readout-aware review showing whether a visible broad resonance/dip exists near the aligned ms=+1 band
success_criteria: execute completes with healthy counts and non-empty savedexperiment
raw/readout-aware pODMR review finds a coherent dip/resonance feature near the expected aligned transition band
result is used only as alignment/resonance screen, not precision mw_freq calibration
stop_conditions: bridge queue is not idle immediately before submission
project lifecycle is canceled or do_not_submit_or_mutate_bridge_queue is true
advisory/validation gate rejects the route or acquisition window
auto-align counts fall below the 12 kcps minimum before RunExperiment
bridge_action: execute manifest-backed pulsed ODMR sequence through MATLAB wrapper
